source.title: PODCAST MREŽNICA -Vanđelić: Hrvatsku razara nabujala država, ubijene institucije, napredak poslušnih

summary.title_hr: PODCAST MREŽNICA -Vanđelić: Hrvatsku razara nabujala država, ubijene institucije, napredak poslušnih
summary.abstract_hr: Damir Vanđelić u podcastu Mrežnica brutalno analizira stanje u Hrvatskoj, ističući kontinuitet komunističkih elita, raširenu korupciju i neefikasnost državnog aparata kao glavne uzroke problema. Naglašava da je masovni odlazak ljudi iz Hrvatske, potaknut korupcijom i nepovjerenjem u budućnost, nepovratan udarac. Kritizira vladine politike koje dovode do neodrživog rasta BDP-a i inflacije, te poziva na manju, efikasniju i digitaliziranu državu oslobođenu korupcije i političkog kadroviranja.
key_points: Hrvatska ima kontinuitet komunističkih elita već osamdeset godina, što sprječava stvarni napredak i dovodi do obnavljanja istih problema.
Korupcija, nepotizam, nefunkcionalno pravosuđe i spori procesi su ključni znakovi disfunkcionalne države, a odlazak preko 520.000 ljudi u 12 godina je nepovratan udarac hrvatskoj opstojnosti.

Procjenjuje se da se u Hrvatskoj godišnje ukrade 5 do 6 milijardi eura javnih sredstava, što je 13-15% BDP-a, a po krađi europskih sredstava Hrvatska je dvostruko gora od Bugarske po glavi stanovnika.
Rast BDP-a u Hrvatskoj je neodrživ jer se temelji na EU fondovima, zaduženjima i doznakama iseljenika, a ne na razvoju industrije zbog sporog pravosuđa i korupcije.
Inflacija je uzrokovana ubacivanjem velikih količina novca u neefikasan sustav i pogrešnim socijalnim politikama Vlade, poput subvencioniranja goriva za sve umjesto ciljanih vaučera za potrebite.
Država je prevelika, neefikasna i previše se miješa u gospodarstvo; rješenje je manja, digitalizirana i profesionalno vođena država bez korupcije, s fokusom na sigurnost, zdravstvo i obrazovanje.
Milanović i Plenković, unatoč međusobnim prepirkama, djeluju kao 'dva lica istog novčića' i pomažu jedan drugome u održavanju statusa quo, sprječavajući dolazak novih političkih opcija.
mentioned_organizations: Ministarstvo prostornog uređenja i graditeljstva državne imovine
summary.title_en: PODCAST MREŽNICA -Vanđelić: Croatia is being destroyed by an overgrown state, killed institutions, the progress of the obedient
summary.abstract_en: Damir Vanđelić in the Mrežnica podcast brutally analyzes the situation in Croatia, highlighting the continuity of communist elites, widespread corruption, and inefficiency of the state apparatus as the main causes of problems. He emphasizes that the mass exodus of people from Croatia, prompted by corruption and distrust in the future, is an irreversible blow. He criticizes government policies that lead to unsustainable GDP growth and inflation, and calls for a smaller, more efficient, and digitized state free from corruption and political appointments.
key_topics_en: role of the diaspora in the Parliament
key_points_en: Croatia has a continuity of communist elites for eighty years already, which prevents real progress and leads to the reoccurrence of the same problems.

Corruption, nepotism, a dysfunctional judiciary and slow processes are key signs of a dysfunctional state, and the departure of over 520,000 people in 12 years is an irreversible blow to Croatian existence.

It is estimated that in Croatia annually 5 to 6 billion euros of public funds are stolen, which is 13-15% of GDP, and regarding the theft of European funds, Croatia is twice as bad as Bulgaria per capita.
GDP growth in Croatia is unsustainable because it is based on EU funds, debts, and remittances from emigrants, and not on industrial development due to slow judiciary and corruption.

Inflation is caused by injecting large amounts of money into an inefficient system and the Government's wrong social policies, such as subsidizing fuel for everyone instead of targeted vouchers for those in need.

The state is too big, inefficient, and interferes too much in the economy; the solution is a smaller, digitized, and professionally managed state without corruption, with a focus on security, healthcare, and education.
Milanović and Plenković, despite mutual quarrels, act as 'two sides of the same coin' and help each other in maintaining the status quo, preventing the arrival of new political options.
mentioned_organizations_en: Ministry of Spatial Planning and Construction of State Property
